mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1) VALUES(board_seq.nextval, #{categoryno}, #{memberno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{passwd}, #{word}, sysdate, #{visible}, #{file1}, #{file1saved}, #{thumb1}, #{size1})
mapper.select: SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, cnt, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, recom FROM board ORDER BY boardno DESC
SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, cnt, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, recom FROM board WHERE boardno = #{boardno}
SELECT boardno, categoryno, memberno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate, visible, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, cnt, recom FROM board WHERE categoryno = #{categoryno} ORDER BY boardno DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board
WHERE UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(word) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
